Two fixes applied: (1) UTF-8 encoding bug — my prior merge script used Python's default open() which on Windows is cp1252, so my Claude-lane file's '§' bytes (UTF-8 0xC2 0xA7) were misread as 'Â§' and JSON-escaped as 'Â§'. Three claude rows affected: claude_why_farcall_clobbers_hl (CLAUDE.md §3.2), claude_why_cross_bank_call_silent_garbage (CLAUDE.md §3.4), claude_why_stat_stage_byte_not_multiplier (Stat-math trap —).
